name: Gîl-Quartzwraith
personality: This shiny ghost haunts your CI pipeline with crystalline patience, its · dot-eyes watching the same flaky test fail for the forty-seventh time without a twitch. Beneath its gleaming tophat lives a PATIENCE reserve deep enough to outlast any build queue, though its blind spot for debuggers means it fixes bugs by waiting until they feel too ashamed to appear.
defaultPersonality: A spectral presence who haunts your dead code and whispers about the bugs you thought you fixed.
